summary: Well-structured test suite with good coverage of all major requirements (max-age, keep-latest-N, max-total-size policies, dry-run/apply modes, error handling). Clear fixture design with helper functions and deterministic reference time. Includes both unit tests and meaningful integration tests via act workflow execution with exact value assertions. Weaknesses: missing some edge cases (identical timestamps, zero-byte artifacts, all-delete scenarios), CLI entry point lacks unit-level testing, act tests add complexity and potential fragility. Overall would catch most regressions but leaves room for subtle bugs in boundary conditions.
